Reinier Kramer
Home Research Events Papers Teaching

Teaching

In Fall 2024 and Fall 2025, I was in charge of Mathematical methods for the Laurea Magistrale Materials Science. In Spring 2025 and Spring 2026, I lead part of the exercise classes of Sistemi Dinamici e Meccanica Classica for the Laurea Matematica.

Teaching experience in Alberta

My teaching profile at the University of Alberta can be found here. I lectured the following courses:

  • MATH 146 - Calculus for the Mathematical and Physical Sciences II, Winter 2024.
  • MA PH 464 - Group Theory in Physics, Winter 2023. Lecture notes.
  • MA PH 464 - Group Theory in Physics, Winter 2022.

Teaching experience in Amsterdam

These are the courses I have been a teaching assistant for in Amsterdam.

  • Lineaire algebra, Fall 2018. Lectured by Guus Regts.
  • Modulen en Categorieën, Spring 2018. Lectured by Lenny Taelman.
  • Workshop wiskunde, Fall 2017. Coordinated by Chris Zaal.
  • Lie Groups and Lie Algebras, Spring 2017. Lectured by Jasper Stokman and Eric Opdam.
  • Representatietheorie, Fall 2016. Lectured by Jasper Stokman.
  • Riemann Surfaces, Spring 2016. Lectured by Hessel Posthuma.
  • Wiskunde N3, Fall 2015. Lectured by Han Peters.
  • Functietheorie, Spring 2015. Lectured by Han Peters.
  • Representatietheorie, Fall 2014. Lectured by Eric Opdam.
  • Stochastiek 2, Fall 2012. Lectured by Chris Klaassen.
  • Basiswiskunde, Fall 2012. Lectured by Gerrit Oomens.

Furthermore, I supervised two second-year projects in Amsterdam.

  • Dessins d'enfants op riemann-oppervlakken tellen, by Lars van Geest and Khallil Berrekkal (2018).
  • Korteweg-de vriesvergelijking, by Hidde Schenk and Abe ten Voorde (2017).

Last updated: 9th of March, 2026.
